query: SELECT id, name, priority, sector, projectState, productLane, matchedBusinessLines, overview FROM projects WHERE isActive = 1 AND priority IN ('hot', 'warm') AND (productLane LIKE '%pump%' OR productLane LIKE '%dewater%' OR JSON_CONTAINS(matchedBusinessLines, '"Pump (Flow)"') OR JSON_CONTAINS(matchedBusinessLines, '"Dewatering Pumps"') OR name LIKE '%dewater%' OR name LIKE '%flood%' OR overview LIKE '%dewater%' OR overview LIKE '%pump%') ORDER BY priority, id LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT id, name, priority, sector, projectState, productLane, matchedBusinessLines, overview FROM projects WHERE isActive = 1 AND priority IN ('hot', 'warm') AND (productLane LIKE '%pump%' OR productLane LIKE '%dewater%' OR JSON_CONTAINS(matchedBusinessLines, '"Pump (Flow)"') OR JSON_CONTAINS(matchedBusinessLines, '"Dewatering Pumps"') OR name LIKE '%dewater%' OR name LIKE '%flood%' OR overview LIKE '%dewater%' OR overview LIKE '%pump%') ORDER BY priority, id LIMIT 20;
